content.text:
# Tokyo Station

This is **Tokyo Station** (東京駅), located in **Tokyo, Japan**.

The building is easily recognizable by its distinctive red-brick Victorian architecture with mansard roofs, which was completed in 1914. The station is one of Japan's most important transportation hubs and a historic landmark. The image shows the front plaza (Marunouchi side) with the modern skyscrapers of the surrounding business district visible in the background, providing a striking contrast between the historic Edwardian-style building and contemporary architecture.
